solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_typealias_before_no_instance_fallback explicitly checks that 'Type::TypeAlias' arm appears before 'no_instance_fallback()' in the source code. test_typealias_unwraps_to_value_type checks for 'value_type' and 'member_lookup_with_policy' in the arm body.
